The enterprise AI knowledge solution custom fit to you
Get a package built around your scale, knowledge complexity, and AI maturity — with the expertise to make it work from day one.
Book a call with our team
Watch an overview
How support teams use Guru to drive better outcomes
Read story
→
SeatGeek's approach to Guru's Enterprise Search

How support team with Guru to drive better outcomes with Shopify

Leveraging Guru for seamless change management

How TravelPerk streamlined comms and boosted agent efficiency
Read story
→
Here's what a package looks like:
The Platform
AI Knowledge Layer
A self-improving knowledge platform that structures, verifies, and delivers trusted answers across your entire stack.
Automated knowledge quality & maintenance
Knowledge Agents for cited, permission-aware answers
AI search grounded in governed knowledge
100+ integrations and MCP delivery
Verification workflows and usage signals
Deep research across your knowledge layer
The Expertise
AI & KM Strategy Team
A team of solution engineers because AI moves fast, and you'll move faster with experts who've seen what works.
Knowledge architecture design
AI agent configuration and tuning
Integration setup and rollout support
Change management playbook
Ongoing optimization reviews
AI strategy advisory aligned to your roadmap
You stay autonomous in day-to-day ops
The Infrastructure
Enterprise Governance
Centralized policy enforcement, permissions inheritance, and audit trails across every knowledge consumer — human and AI.
SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GxP compliance
SSO, SCIM, and role-based access
Data Loss Prevention (DLP) Masking
Data encryption at rest and in transit
Permission-aware answers with citations and lineage
Centralized audit logs across all consumers
Your data never trains our AI models
Frequently Asked Q's
How does Guru pricing work?
Guru is a platform and expertise solution — not just a per-seat tool. Your investment is tailored to your organization's scale, knowledge complexity, and AI maturity. It includes full platform access, access to a team of solution engineers, knowledge architecture design, and ongoing optimization. Our team will scope the right engagement during your first conversation.
What does the expertise layer include?
Think of it as embedding a KM and AI strategy team into your organization. We design your knowledge architecture, configure and tune your AI agents, build your rollout playbook, and provide ongoing advisory on how to get the most out of your AI investments. Your team retains full control of the Guru environment — our expertise accelerates your time-to-value and ensures you're set up correctly from day one. It's a launchpad, not an ongoing dependency.
How is Guru different from Glean, Copilot, or building our own?
Other platforms connect to your data and retrieve what's there — as-is. Guru structures, governs, and continuously improves your knowledge so it gets more accurate over time. Corrections propagate everywhere. Governance is centralized, not per-tool. And Guru powers your existing AI tools via MCP rather than competing with them. Plus, you get the strategy and expertise to make it work — not just an instruction manual.
What integrations does Guru support?
Guru connects to 100+ enterprise tools out of the box — Slack, Microsoft Teams, Salesforce, Zendesk, Confluence, SharePoint, and more. Through MCP, your AI tools and agents pull from the same governed knowledge layer without rebuilding permissions or governance per tool.
Take a look at our
integrations
. If something you need isn't there yet, let us know—we're always adding new flavors to our integrations lineup.
What security and compliance standards does Guru meet?
Guru is audited annually for SOC 2, Type II, Microsoft 365 Certification and the Google Cloud App Security Assessment framework (CASA). In addition, Guru has crosswalked its family of standards to industry requirements such as GDPR, HIPAA, HECVAT and CAIQ and will support those customers accordingly. Guru implements a host of protections and best practices for data security. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Permissions are inherited from your existing systems and enforced in real time. Every answer includes citations and audit trails, and your data never trains an AI LLM.
Can I see Guru before committing?
Absolutely. Our first conversation is a working session — not a sales pitch. We'll walk through how Guru fits your stack, your governance requirements, and your AI roadmap with real use cases relevant to your organization.
Do you have non-profit pricing?
Yes! Guru for Good is a Give First initiative that offers Guru at a reduced cost to eligible organizations.  If your team is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit reach out for more info.
Thank you for your dedicated service to others. 💚
Information Technology
Mid-Market  | 51–1000 employees
"Guru is a top-notch knowledge management platform...seamless integration, efficient search functionality, robust security measures, and exceptional support make it a must-have.”
Information Technology
Mid-Market  | 51–200 employees
"Guru's content verification process ensures the reliability and accuracy of knowledge, a crucial aspect for organizations in industries with compliance or accuracy requirements."
Head of Operations
Mid-Market  | 51–1000 employees
"Guru has helped solve problems with our Engineering section, our IT & Operations, Product Management, Security Policies and many more benefits. It also helped with organizing our problems so it makes the solving easier to manage."
Information Technology and Services
Mid-Market  | 51–1000 employees
“Guru prioritizes data security, offering features like access controls, encryption, and audit logs to safeguard sensitive information and provide peace of mind."
Sathish K.
Mid-Market  | 51–1000 employees
"It integrates with all of the tools you could ever need, from HR to Slack.”
Human Resources / Compliance
Mid-Market  |  51-200 employees
“As a company that deals with compliance in over 150 countries, Guru is our main source of truth for managing knowledge.”
Customer Service / Internal Comms
Mid-Market  | 51–200 employees
“It streamlines information access, boosting efficiency by eliminating time wasted searching for answers...Verification intervals keep knowledge current and permission controls ensure content security."
Ready to try AI built on your knowledge?

analysis.name: Guru
analysis.tagline: The Governed Knowledge Layer for Enterprise AI
analysis.value_proposition: Guru structures, governs, and continuously improves company knowledge so every AI tool and employee receives trusted, permission-aware answers.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises needing governed, AI-powered knowledge management across support, sales, HR, and operations teams

features.name: knowledge agents
features.description: AI agents that answer questions with citations by searching connected knowledge sources

features.name: knowledge agent skills
features.description: Specialized skill configurations for agents (call prep, onboarding, sales playbook, KCS, tech support, etc.)

features.name: ai search
features.description: Enterprise AI search grounded in governed knowledge layer with cited answers
features.evidence_quote: AI search grounded in governed knowledge

features.name: deep research
features.description: Agentic deep research across the full knowledge layer
features.evidence_quote: Deep research across your knowledge layer

features.name: verification workflows
features.description: Workflows to verify and mark knowledge as trusted; route content to subject matter experts
features.evidence_quote: What is Verification? How Content is Verified in Guru

features.name: auto-verification
features.description: Automatically verifies content as usage increases; flags stale and non-compliant content

features.name: stale content detection
features.description: Detects and flags outdated pages and content for review or archiving

features.name: knowledge gap identification
features.description: Identifies gaps in knowledge coverage from unanswered questions

features.name: duplicate detection
features.description: Detects and merges duplicate knowledge entries

features.name: corrections propagation
features.description: Corrections to knowledge propagate automatically everywhere it is referenced

features.name: ai draft generation
features.description: AI drafts new knowledge documents from Slack threads and repeated questions

features.name: repeated question capture
features.description: Captures repeated Slack questions to surface knowledge documentation needs

features.name: call themes summarization
features.description: Summarizes themes from sales or support calls

features.name: cards
features.description: Core knowledge unit for storing and sharing individual pieces of knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Guru Cards — Editing Guru Cards — Using Guru Card Templates

features.name: card templates
features.description: Pre-built templates for creating consistent knowledge cards

features.name: collections
features.description: Top-level organizational containers for grouping related knowledge

features.name: folders
features.description: Sub-level organizational containers within collections

features.name: pages
features.description: Long-form content pages for structured documentation
features.evidence_quote: Creating and managing Pages in Guru

features.name: card manager
features.description: Bulk management interface for cards with automations
features.evidence_quote: Using the Card Manager — Automating Card Management

features.name: tags / tag manager
features.description: Tag cards for categorization; bulk-manage tags via the Tag Manager
features.evidence_quote: Guru Card Tagging — Bulk-Managing Tags in the Tag Manager

features.name: publishing workflow
features.description: Draft, review, and publish workflow for knowledge content

features.name: card commenting
features.description: Comments and discussions on individual knowledge cards

features.name: announcements
features.description: Push announcements to teams to ensure important knowledge is seen

features.name: ai assist
features.description: AI assistance when viewing cards, with custom prompt support
features.evidence_quote: Using AI Assist When Viewing Cards — Best Practices: Custom Prompts for AI Assist

features.name: team hubs
features.description: Dedicated knowledge hubs for specific teams with curated content

features.name: team essentials
features.description: Customizable navigation pinning for teams
features.evidence_quote: Customizing your navigation with Team Essentials and My Pins

features.name: workspaces
features.description: Separate workspaces for different organizational units

features.name: ai agent center
features.description: Central hub for managing and monitoring AI agents

features.name: sso
features.description: Single Sign-On support for Okta, Microsoft Entra, OneLogin, ADFS, JumpCloud, LastPass, Google Workspace

features.name: scim
features.description: SCIM provisioning for automated user lifecycle management
features.evidence_quote: Setting up Microsoft Entra SSO and SCIM — Setting up Okta SSO and SCIM

features.name: custom roles
features.description: Custom permission roles (e.g. Author, Expert) for fine-grained access control

features.name: groups
features.description: User groups for managing permissions and content access at scale

features.name: role-based access control
features.description: Permission-aware content access with role-based rules

features.name: permission-aware ai
features.description: AI answers respect user permissions and only surface authorized content

features.name: role-scoped answers
features.description: AI answers scoped per role so different roles see different responses

features.name: audit trails
features.description: Centralized audit logs across all knowledge consumers — human and AI
features.evidence_quote: Centralized audit logs across all consumers

features.name: dlp masking
features.description: Data Loss Prevention masking for sensitive information

features.name: data encryption
features.description: Encryption of all data at rest and in transit
features.evidence_quote: Data encryption at rest and in transit

features.name: configurable guardrails
features.description: Configurable AI guardrails to enforce content and compliance policies

features.name: soc 2 type ii
features.description: Annual SOC 2 Type II audit certification
features.evidence_quote: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GxP compliance

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-ready compliance for healthcare organizations

features.name: gxp compliance
features.description: GxP compliance for pharmaceutical and clinical research
features.evidence_quote: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GxP compliance

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR compliance crosswalked from SOC 2 family of standards
features.evidence_quote: Guru has crosswalked its family of standards to industry requirements such as GDPR

features.name: microsoft 365 certification
features.description: Microsoft 365 security certification

features.name: answer citations
features.description: Every AI answer includes citations with lineage to source documents

features.name: hris sync
features.description: Sync with HRIS systems for employee profiles and org charts
features.evidence_quote: Employee Profiles, Org Charts, and HRIS Sync

features.name: employee profiles
features.description: Employee profiles and organizational charts built from HRIS data
features.evidence_quote: Employee Profiles, Org Charts, and HRIS Sync

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Guru as an MCP server so AI tools pull from the governed knowledge layer without rebuilding permissions
features.evidence_quote: Using Guru as an MCP Server

features.name: browser extension
features.description: Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge extensions for in-browser knowledge access
features.evidence_quote: Google Chrome — Where you search from

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Search Guru and receive answers directly within Slack; Slack threads captured as knowledge source
features.evidence_quote: Slack — Where you search from — Sources you search

features.name: microsoft teams integration
features.description: Access and search knowledge from within Microsoft Teams
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Teams — Where you search from

features.name: content embedding
features.description: Embed external content into Guru cards and embed Guru cards into external webpages
features.evidence_quote: Embedding Content into Guru Cards — Embedding a Guru Card into a webpage

features.name: content export
features.description: Export knowledge content from Guru

features.name: knowledge migration
features.description: Migrate existing knowledge into Guru from other systems

features.name: content archiving
features.description: Archive and delete outdated cards and content

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Use Guru UI and content in languages other than English
features.evidence_quote: Using Guru in languages other than English

features.name: favorite cards/folders
features.description: Bookmark favorite cards and folders for quick personal access

features.name: following cards and authors
features.description: Follow cards and authors to receive notifications on updates

features.name: usage signals
features.description: Track content usage to surface what is actively used vs. stale

features.name: knowledge architecture design
features.description: Expert-assisted knowledge architecture design included in platform package

features.name: ai strategy advisory
features.description: Ongoing AI strategy advisory aligned to customer roadmap from embedded KM/AI team
features.evidence_quote: AI strategy advisory aligned to your roadmap

features.name: change management playbook
features.description: Rollout playbook and change management support from solution engineering team

features.name: proof of concept (self-serve)
features.description: Self-serve proof-of-concept flow for Knowledge Agents
features.evidence_quote: Running a self-serve Proof of Concept for Knowledge Agents

differentiators: Structures, governs, and continuously improves knowledge — not just retrieves it as-is
Corrections propagate everywhere automatically across all consumers
Permission-aware AI answers that inherit permissions from existing systems in real time
MCP delivery powers existing AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor, Claude) rather than competing with them
Your data never trains Guru's AI models
Includes embedded KM and AI strategy team as part of the platform package — not just software
Centralized governance across every knowledge consumer — human and AI — not per-tool
Knowledge agents that auto-verify and auto-unverify content based on usage and compliance signals

recent_ships.what: Knowledge Agents can now verify and unverify info automatically
recent_ships.source: Knowledge Agents can now verify and unverify info for you — New (landing/pricing banner)

tiers.name: Enterprise (custom)
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI Knowledge Layer + KM/AI Strategy Team + Enterprise Governance; fully scoped to org scale and AI maturity

pricing.notes: Fully custom pricing with no published seat rates or free tier. Investment scoped per organization scale, knowledge complexity, and AI maturity. Package includes full platform access, embedded solution engineering team, knowledge architecture design, AI agent configuration, rollout playbook, and ongoing optimization advisory.
